solutions-backup.template:
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <title data-cms="cms-68">Backup and Recovery Solutions | Rain Networks</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Fast disk imaging, cloud backup, and rapid recovery that keeps your clients running through hardware failure, human error, or ransomware." data-cms="cms-69">
  <link rel="icon" type="image/jpeg" href="https://rain-networks-v2.up.railway.app/Rain.jpg">
  <meta property="og:type" content="website">
  <meta property="og:site_name" content="Rain Networks">
  <meta property="og:title" content="Backup and Recovery Solutions | Rain Networks" data-cms="cms-70">
  <meta property="og:description" content="Fast disk imaging, cloud backup, and rapid recovery that keeps your clients running through hardware failure, human error, or ransomware." data-cms="cms-71">
  <meta property="og:image" content="container_logistics.jpg" data-cms="cms-72">
  <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
  <meta name="twitter:title" content="Backup and Recovery Solutions | Rain Networks" data-cms="cms-73">
  <meta name="twitter:description" content="Fast disk imaging, cloud backup, and rapid recovery that keeps your clients running through hardware failure, human error, or ransomware." data-cms="cms-74">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;600;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
    :root{
      --bg:#060d18; --surface:#0b1322; --surface-2:#0f1b2e;
      --border:#1b2740; --border-2:#2a3a57;
      --text:#e8eef6; --muted:#93a4ba; --faint:#5f7188;
      --accent:#3b82f6; --accent-text:#6ea2ff; --accent-strong:#2563eb;
      --radius:14px; --radius-lg:22px; --maxw:1220px;
      --shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(2,6,16,.55);
      --font:'Manrope',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
      --display:'Space Grotesk','Manrope',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth;scroll-padding-top:80px}
    body{font-family:var(--font);background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);line-height:1.6;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;overflow-x:hidden}
    body::before{content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-2;background:
      radial-gradient(110% 60% at 50% -10%, rgba(37,99,235,.16) 0%, transparent 55%),
      var(--bg)}
    img{display:block;max-width:100%}
    a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
    h1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:var(--display);line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-.02em;font-weight:600}
    section{padding:clamp(60px,8vw,116px) 24px;position:relative}
    .wrap{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto}
    .accent{color:var(--accent-text)}
    .eyebrow{display:inline-block;font-size:.74rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-text);font-family:var(--font)}
    .lead{color:var(--muted);font-size:clamp(1.02rem,1.4vw,1.16rem);max-width:60ch}
    .center{text-align:center;margin-inline:auto}
    .ico svg{width:26px;height:26px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:1.6;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}

    .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5em;font-weight:600;font-size:.98rem;padding:.82em 1.55em;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s ease,background .2s ease,border-color .2s ease}
    .btn-primary{background:var(--accent-strong);color:#fff}
    .btn-primary:hover{background:#1e54cf;transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .btn-primary:active{transform:translateY(0)}
    .btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--text);border-color:var(--border-2)}
    .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(59,130,246,.08);transform:translateY(-2px)}

    header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;backdrop-filter:blur(14px) saturate(150%);background:rgba(6,13,24,.78);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    nav{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;padding:13px 24px;height:64px}
    .logo-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-right:auto}
    .logo-img{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--border-2)}
    .logo-text{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:-.01em}
    .nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;list-style:none}
    .nav-links a{padding:8px 13px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:500;font-size:.94rem;color:var(--muted);transition:color .2s,background .2s}
    .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--text);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05)}
    .btn-nav{background:var(--accent-strong);color:#fff;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:9px;font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;transition:background .2s,transform .2s}
    .btn-nav:hover{background:#1e54cf;transform:translateY(-1px)}
    .nav-toggle,.nav-burger{display:none}
    .nav-burger{flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;padding:8px}
    .nav-burger span{display:block;width:23px;height:2px;background:var(--text);border-radius:2px;transition:.3s}

    #hero{padding:0;min-height:88vh;display:flex;align-items:center;overflow:hidden}
    .hero-media{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0}
    .hero-bg{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
    .hero-media::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(100deg,rgba(6,13,24,.62) 0%,rgba(6,13,24,.30) 38%,transparent 66%)}
    .hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;padding:96px 24px;width:100%}
    .hero-inner h1{font-size:clamp(2.6rem,6vw,4.7rem);font-weight:700;max-width:15ch;margin:.34em 0 .42em}
    .hero-inner .lead{margin-bottom:2em;font-size:clamp(1.06rem,1.7vw,1.3rem);color:#eef3fa;max-width:46ch}
    .hero-inner h1,.hero-inner .lead,.hero-inner .eyebrow{text-shadow:0 2px 18px rgba(2,6,16,.6),0 1px 4px rgba(2,6,16,.7)}
    .hero-ctas{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:13px}

    #impact{padding-block:clamp(40px,5vw,64px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .impact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}
    .stat{padding:8px 26px;border-left:1px solid var(--border)}
    .stat:first-child{border-left:0;padding-left:0}
    .stat .n{display:block;font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3vw,2.4rem);font-weight:600;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-.02em}
    .stat .l{display:block;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px}

    .sec-head{max-width:680px;margin-bottom:48px}
    .sec-head h2{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.6vw,2.8rem);font-weight:600;margin:.34em 0 .4em}
    .sec-head.center{margin-inline:auto}

    .sol-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:18px}
    .sol-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:0 1 calc(33.333% - 12px);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .3s ease,border-color .3s ease}
    .sol-link{margin-top:auto;color:var(--accent-text);font-weight:600;font-size:.92rem}
    .sol-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .sol-card .thumb{aspect-ratio:16/10;overflow:hidden}
    .sol-card .thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .5s ease}
    .sol-card:hover .thumb img{transform:scale(1.05)}
    .sol-body{padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
    .sol-body h3{font-size:1.24rem;margin-bottom:.45em}
    .sol-body p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:1.1em}
    .feat-list{list-style:none;display:grid;gap:9px;margin-top:auto}
    .feat-list li{padding-left:26px;position:relative;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text)}
    .feat-list li svg{position:absolute;left:0;top:3px;width:16px;height:16px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}

    .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0 56px}
    .why-item{display:flex;gap:18px;padding:26px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .why-item .ico{flex:0 0 auto;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:11px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(59,130,246,.1);border:1px solid var(--border-2)}
    .why-item h3{font-size:1.12rem;margin-bottom:.35em;font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600}
    .why-item p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.94rem}

    .steps{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:0}
    .step{padding:0 34px;border-left:1px solid var(--border)}
    .step:first-child{border-left:0;padding-left:0}
    .step .k{font-family:var(--display);font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--accent-text)}
    .step h3{font-size:1.45rem;margin:.5em 0 .4em;font-weight:600}
    .step p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.96rem}

    .vcard-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:18px}
    .vendor-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s}
    .vendor-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .vendor-card .v-img{aspect-ratio:16/10;object-fit:cover;width:100%}
    .v-body{padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
    .v-cat{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-text);font-family:var(--font)}
    .v-body h3{font-size:1.28rem;font-weight:600;margin:.4em 0 .1em}
    .v-tag{color:var(--text);font-weight:500;font-size:.94rem;margin-bottom:.5em}
    .v-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:1.1em}
    .v-foot{margin-top:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding-top:13px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .v-rating{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
    .v-rating svg{width:15px;height:15px;fill:var(--accent-text)}
    .v-link{color:var(--accent-text);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem}

    .pull{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center}
    .pull blockquote{font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3.4vw,2.4rem);font-weight:500;line-height:1.32;letter-spacing:-.015em;color:#eef3fa}
    .pull blockquote .accent{font-weight:600}
    .pull-by{margin-top:24px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;font-size:.98rem}

    .faq-list{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;gap:10px}
    details{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s}
    details[open]{border-color:var(--border-2)}
    summary{padding:19px 22px;font-weight:600;font-size:1.04rem;font-family:var(--display);cursor:pointer;list-style:none;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;align-items:center}
    summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
    summary::after{content:"+";font-size:1.45rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--accent-text);transition:transform .3s}
    details[open] summary::after{transform:rotate(45deg)}
    details p{padding:0 22px 21px;color:var(--muted)}

    .contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(232px,1fr));gap:16px;margin-bottom:44px}
    .contact-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:30px 24px;text-align:center;transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s}
    .contact-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .contact-card .ico{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;margin:0 auto 16px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(59,130,246,.1);border:1px solid var(--border-2)}
    .contact-card h3{font-size:1.08rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.5em}
    .contact-card a,.contact-card p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.94rem;display:block}
    .contact-card a:hover{color:var(--accent-text)}

    .cta-band{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-2);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:clamp(40px,6vw,72px);text-align:center}
    .cta-band h2{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.6vw,2.7rem);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.4em}
    .cta-band .lead{margin:0 auto 1.7em}

    footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:60px 24px 36px;background:rgba(6,13,24,.6)}
    .foot-grid{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.6fr 1fr 1fr;gap:40px}
    .foot-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
    .foot-brand img{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover}
    .foot-brand .logo-text{font-size:1.05rem}
    .foot-tag{color:var(--muted);font-size:.93rem;max-width:34ch}
    .foot-contact{margin-top:18px;display:grid;gap:6px}
    .foot-contact a,.foot-contact p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.91rem}
    .foot-contact a:hover{color:var(--accent-text)}
    .foot-col h4{font-family:var(--font);font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--faint);margin-bottom:15px;font-weight:600}
    .foot-col ul{list-style:none;display:grid;gap:10px}
    .foot-col a{color:var(--muted);font-size:.92rem}
    .foot-col a:hover{color:var(--accent-text)}
    .foot-bottom{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:38px auto 0;padding-top:22px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
    .foot-bottom p{color:var(--faint);font-size:.85rem}
    .social{display:flex;gap:9px}
    .social a{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--border);display:grid;place-items:center;color:var(--muted);transition:.22s}
    .social a svg{width:17px;height:17px;fill:currentColor}
    .social a:hover{color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(37,99,235,.16)}

    @keyframes reveal{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference){
      .reveal{animation:reveal linear both;animation-timeline:view();animation-range:entry 0% entry 24%}
    }

    @media (max-width:900px){
      .sol-card{flex:0 1 calc(50% - 9px)}
      .why-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .steps{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .step{border-left:0;padding:0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:26px;margin-top:26px}
      .step:first-child{border-top:0;margin-top:0;padding-top:0}
    }
    @media (max-width:860px){
      .nav-links{position:fixed;inset:64px 0 auto 0;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0;background:rgba(6,13,24,.98);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 16px 18px;transform:translateY(-130%);transition:transform .32s ease;backdrop-filter:blur(18px)}
      .nav-links a{padding:14px;border-radius:10px}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-links{transform:translateY(0)}
      .nav-burger{display:flex}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-burger span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg)}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-burger span:nth-child(2){opacity:0}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-burger span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg)}
      .btn-nav{display:none}
      .impact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px 0}
      .stat{padding:8px 22px}
      .stat:nth-child(odd){border-left:0;padding-left:0}
      .foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:30px}
    }
    @media (max-width:600px){.sol-card{flex:1 1 100%}}
    @media (max-width:480px){.hero-ctas .btn{width:100%;justify-content:center}}
      /* vendors mega-dropdown */
    .nav-dd{position:relative}
    .nav-dd>.nav-dd-toggle::after{content:"\25BE";font-size:.7em;margin-left:5px;opacity:.7}
    .nav-dd-menu{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);right:0;left:auto;display:none;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(146px,1fr));gap:14px 22px;background:rgba(8,15,27,.99);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:18px;box-shadow:0 26px 64px rgba(0,0,0,.55);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);z-index:60}
    .nav-dd:hover .nav-dd-menu,.nav-dd:focus-within .nav-dd-menu{display:grid}
    .dd-cat{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
    .nav-dd-menu a{padding:4px 0!important;border-radius:0!important;background:none!important;font-size:.86rem;color:var(--muted)!important;white-space:nowrap}
    .nav-dd-menu a:hover{color:var(--accent-text)!important}
    .nav-dd-menu .dd-cat-link{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text)!important;padding-bottom:6px!important;margin-bottom:5px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    @media (max-width:860px){
      .nav-dd-menu{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;background:none;border:0;box-shadow:none;padding:4px 0 8px 14px;backdrop-filter:none}
      .nav-dd>.nav-dd-toggle::after{display:none}
    }
  </style>
  <style>
    .page-hero{padding:118px 24px 56px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .page-hero .backlink{display:inline-block;color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:16px}
    .page-hero .backlink:hover{color:var(--accent-text)}
    .page-hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.3rem,5vw,3.7rem);font-weight:700;max-width:18ch;margin:.1em 0 .3em}
    .page-hero .lead{max-width:60ch}
    .vcard-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:18px}
    .vendor-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:0 1 calc(33.333% - 12px);min-width:270px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s}
    .vendor-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .vendor-card .v-img{aspect-ratio:16/10;object-fit:cover;width:100%}
    .v-body{padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
    .v-cat{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-text);font-family:var(--font)}
    .v-body h3{font-size:1.28rem;font-weight:600;margin:.4em 0 .1em}
    .v-tag{color:var(--text);font-weight:500;font-size:.94rem;margin-bottom:.5em}
    .v-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:1.1em}
    .v-foot{margin-top:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding-top:13px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .v-rating{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
    .v-rating svg{width:15px;height:15px;fill:var(--accent-text)}
    .v-link{color:var(--accent-text);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem}
    .vhero{padding:112px 24px 66px}
    .vhero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.08fr .92fr;gap:clamp(30px,5vw,60px);align-items:center}
    .vhero-text h1{font-size:clamp(2.4rem,5vw,3.7rem);font-weight:700;margin:.12em 0 .14em}
    .vtag{font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(1.1rem,1.9vw,1.35rem);font-weight:500;color:var(--accent-text);margin-bottom:.65em}
    .vhero .lead{margin-bottom:1.5em}
    .vmeta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-top:22px;color:var(--muted);font-size:.92rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .vmeta .v-rating{color:var(--text)}
    .vmeta .pill{text-transform:capitalize;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-2);border-radius:999px;padding:5px 14px;font-size:.85rem}
    .vhero-media img{width:100%;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);aspect-ratio:4/3;object-fit:cover}
    .vstatement{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,82px) 24px;border-block:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02)}
    .vstatement .wrap{max-width:980px}
    .vstatement p{font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(1.3rem,2.6vw,1.95rem);font-weight:500;line-height:1.36;letter-spacing:-.01em;color:#eaf0f8}
    .vsec{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,88px) 24px}
    .vsec.alt{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border-block:1px solid var(--border)}
    .cap-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(282px,1fr));gap:16px}
    .cap{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:22px;transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s}
    .cap:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .cap-ic{flex:0 0 auto;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:9px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(59,130,246,.12);border:1px solid var(--border-2)}
    .cap-ic svg{width:17px;height:17px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:2.2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
    .cap p{font-size:.97rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);line-height:1.45}
    .split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(28px,5vw,56px);align-items:center}
    .split-media img{width:100%;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);aspect-ratio:4/3;object-fit:cover}
    .split h2{font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3.2vw,2.3rem);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.8em}
    .benefit-list{list-style:none;display:grid;gap:0}
    .benefit-list li{display:flex;gap:13px;padding:15px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);font-size:.98rem}
    .benefit-list li:first-child{border-top:0}
    .benefit-list li svg{flex:0 0 auto;width:20px;height:20px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:2.2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;margin-top:1px}
    .lineup{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0 48px}
    .lineup .item{padding:22px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .lineup .item h3{font-size:1.13rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.3em}
    .lineup .item p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.93rem}
    .fit{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.25fr .75fr;gap:clamp(28px,4vw,52px);align-items:start}
    .fit h2{font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3.2vw,2.3rem);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.9em}
    .chip-list{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px}
    .chip-list li{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-2);border-radius:999px;padding:10px 18px;font-size:.92rem}
    .spec{display:grid;gap:0;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden}
    .spec .row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;padding:14px 20px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-size:.92rem}
    .spec .row:first-child{border-top:0}
    .spec .row .k{color:var(--muted)}
    .spec .row .v{color:var(--text);font-weight:600;text-transform:capitalize;text-align:right}
    .sell{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-2);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:clamp(40px,6vw,68px);text-align:center}
    .sell h2{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.4vw,2.5rem);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.4em}
    .sell .lead{margin:0 auto 2em}
    .sell-pts{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;max-width:780px;margin:0 auto 2.2em;text-align:left}
    .sell-pt{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start}
    .sell-pt svg{flex:0 0 auto;width:22px;height:22px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:1.7;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
    .sell-pt b{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;font-size:.97rem;display:block;margin-bottom:3px}
    .sell-pt span{color:var(--muted);font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.4}
    @media(max-width:900px){.vcard-grid .vendor-card{flex:0 1 calc(50% - 9px)}}
    @media(max-width:820px){.vhero-grid,.split,.fit,.lineup{grid-template-columns:1fr}.sell-pts{grid-template-columns:1fr;max-width:420px}}
    @media(max-width:600px){.vcard-grid .vendor-card{flex:1 1 100%}}
  </style>
</head>

  <meta property="og:site_name" content="Rain Networks">
  <meta property="og:title" content="Macrium, Backup & Recovery | Rain Networks" data-cms="cms-106">
  <meta property="og:description" content="Macrium Reflect is the gold standard for disk imaging and backup. Trusted by millions worldwide, Macrium provides fast, reliable backup and rapid recovery capabilities that ke" data-cms="cms-107">

  <meta name="twitter:title" content="Macrium, Backup & Recovery | Rain Networks" data-cms="cms-109">
  <meta name="twitter:description" content="Macrium Reflect is the gold standard for disk imaging and backup. Trusted by millions worldwide, Macrium provides fast, reliable backup and rapid recovery capabilities that ke" data-cms="cms-110">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;600;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
    :root{
      --bg:#060d18; --surface:#0b1322; --surface-2:#0f1b2e;
      --border:#1b2740; --border-2:#2a3a57;
      --text:#e8eef6; --muted:#93a4ba; --faint:#5f7188;
      --accent:#3b82f6; --accent-text:#6ea2ff; --accent-strong:#2563eb;
      --radius:14px; --radius-lg:22px; --maxw:1220px;
      --shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(2,6,16,.55);
      --font:'Manrope',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
      --display:'Space Grotesk','Manrope',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth;scroll-padding-top:80px}
    body{font-family:var(--font);background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);line-height:1.6;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;overflow-x:hidden}
    body::before{content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-2;background:
      radial-gradient(110% 60% at 50% -10%, rgba(37,99,235,.16) 0%, transparent 55%),
      var(--bg)}
    img{display:block;max-width:100%}
    a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
    h1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:var(--display);line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-.02em;font-weight:600}
    section{padding:clamp(60px,8vw,116px) 24px;position:relative}
    .wrap{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto}
    .accent{color:var(--accent-text)}
    .eyebrow{display:inline-block;font-size:.74rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-text);font-family:var(--font)}
    .lead{color:var(--muted);font-size:clamp(1.02rem,1.4vw,1.16rem);max-width:60ch}
    .center{text-align:center;margin-inline:auto}
    .ico svg{width:26px;height:26px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:1.6;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}

    .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5em;font-weight:600;font-size:.98rem;padding:.82em 1.55em;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s ease,background .2s ease,border-color .2s ease}
    .btn-primary{background:var(--accent-strong);color:#fff}
    .btn-primary:hover{background:#1e54cf;transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .btn-primary:active{transform:translateY(0)}
    .btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--text);border-color:var(--border-2)}
    .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(59,130,246,.08);transform:translateY(-2px)}

    header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;backdrop-filter:blur(14px) saturate(150%);background:rgba(6,13,24,.78);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    nav{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;padding:13px 24px;height:64px}
    .logo-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-right:auto}
    .logo-img{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--border-2)}
    .logo-text{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:-.01em}
    .nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;list-style:none}
    .nav-links a{padding:8px 13px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:500;font-size:.94rem;color:var(--muted);transition:color .2s,background .2s}
    .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--text);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05)}
    .btn-nav{background:var(--accent-strong);color:#fff;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:9px;font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;transition:background .2s,transform .2s}
    .btn-nav:hover{background:#1e54cf;transform:translateY(-1px)}
    .nav-toggle,.nav-burger{display:none}
    .nav-burger{flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;padding:8px}
    .nav-burger span{display:block;width:23px;height:2px;background:var(--text);border-radius:2px;transition:.3s}

    #hero{padding:0;min-height:88vh;display:flex;align-items:center;overflow:hidden}
    .hero-media{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0}
    .hero-bg{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
    .hero-media::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(100deg,rgba(6,13,24,.62) 0%,rgba(6,13,24,.30) 38%,transparent 66%)}
    .hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;padding:96px 24px;width:100%}
    .hero-inner h1{font-size:clamp(2.6rem,6vw,4.7rem);font-weight:700;max-width:15ch;margin:.34em 0 .42em}
    .hero-inner .lead{margin-bottom:2em;font-size:clamp(1.06rem,1.7vw,1.3rem);color:#eef3fa;max-width:46ch}
    .hero-inner h1,.hero-inner .lead,.hero-inner .eyebrow{text-shadow:0 2px 18px rgba(2,6,16,.6),0 1px 4px rgba(2,6,16,.7)}
    .hero-ctas{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:13px}

    #impact{padding-block:clamp(40px,5vw,64px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .impact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}
    .stat{padding:8px 26px;border-left:1px solid var(--border)}
    .stat:first-child{border-left:0;padding-left:0}
    .stat .n{display:block;font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3vw,2.4rem);font-weight:600;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-.02em}
    .stat .l{display:block;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px}

    .sec-head{max-width:680px;margin-bottom:48px}
    .sec-head h2{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.6vw,2.8rem);font-weight:600;margin:.34em 0 .4em}
    .sec-head.center{margin-inline:auto}

    .sol-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:18px}
    .sol-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:0 1 calc(33.333% - 12px);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .3s ease,border-color .3s ease}
    .sol-link{margin-top:auto;color:var(--accent-text);font-weight:600;font-size:.92rem}
    .sol-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .sol-card .thumb{aspect-ratio:16/10;overflow:hidden}
    .sol-card .thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .5s ease}
    .sol-card:hover .thumb img{transform:scale(1.05)}
    .sol-body{padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
    .sol-body h3{font-size:1.24rem;margin-bottom:.45em}
    .sol-body p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:1.1em}
    .feat-list{list-style:none;display:grid;gap:9px;margin-top:auto}
    .feat-list li{padding-left:26px;position:relative;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text)}
    .feat-list li svg{position:absolute;left:0;top:3px;width:16px;height:16px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}

    .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0 56px}
    .why-item{display:flex;gap:18px;padding:26px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .why-item .ico{flex:0 0 auto;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:11px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(59,130,246,.1);border:1px solid var(--border-2)}
    .why-item h3{font-size:1.12rem;margin-bottom:.35em;font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600}
    .why-item p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.94rem}

    .steps{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:0}
    .step{padding:0 34px;border-left:1px solid var(--border)}
    .step:first-child{border-left:0;padding-left:0}
    .step .k{font-family:var(--display);font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--accent-text)}
    .step h3{font-size:1.45rem;margin:.5em 0 .4em;font-weight:600}
    .step p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.96rem}

    .vcard-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:18px}
    .vendor-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s}
    .vendor-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .vendor-card .v-img{aspect-ratio:16/10;object-fit:cover;width:100%}
    .v-body{padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
    .v-cat{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-text);font-family:var(--font)}
    .v-body h3{font-size:1.28rem;font-weight:600;margin:.4em 0 .1em}
    .v-tag{color:var(--text);font-weight:500;font-size:.94rem;margin-bottom:.5em}
    .v-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:1.1em}
    .v-foot{margin-top:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding-top:13px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .v-rating{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
    .v-rating svg{width:15px;height:15px;fill:var(--accent-text)}
    .v-link{color:var(--accent-text);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem}

    .pull{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center}
    .pull blockquote{font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3.4vw,2.4rem);font-weight:500;line-height:1.32;letter-spacing:-.015em;color:#eef3fa}
    .pull blockquote .accent{font-weight:600}
    .pull-by{margin-top:24px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;font-size:.98rem}

    .faq-list{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;gap:10px}
    details{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s}
    details[open]{border-color:var(--border-2)}
    summary{padding:19px 22px;font-weight:600;font-size:1.04rem;font-family:var(--display);cursor:pointer;list-style:none;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;align-items:center}
    summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
    summary::after{content:"+";font-size:1.45rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--accent-text);transition:transform .3s}
    details[open] summary::after{transform:rotate(45deg)}
    details p{padding:0 22px 21px;color:var(--muted)}

    .contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(232px,1fr));gap:16px;margin-bottom:44px}
    .contact-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:30px 24px;text-align:center;transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s}
    .contact-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .contact-card .ico{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;margin:0 auto 16px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(59,130,246,.1);border:1px solid var(--border-2)}
    .contact-card h3{font-size:1.08rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.5em}
    .contact-card a,.contact-card p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.94rem;display:block}
    .contact-card a:hover{color:var(--accent-text)}

    .cta-band{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-2);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:clamp(40px,6vw,72px);text-align:center}
    .cta-band h2{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.6vw,2.7rem);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.4em}
    .cta-band .lead{margin:0 auto 1.7em}

    footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:60px 24px 36px;background:rgba(6,13,24,.6)}
    .foot-grid{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.6fr 1fr 1fr;gap:40px}
    .foot-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
    .foot-brand img{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover}
    .foot-brand .logo-text{font-size:1.05rem}
    .foot-tag{color:var(--muted);font-size:.93rem;max-width:34ch}
    .foot-contact{margin-top:18px;display:grid;gap:6px}
    .foot-contact a,.foot-contact p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.91rem}
    .foot-contact a:hover{color:var(--accent-text)}
    .foot-col h4{font-family:var(--font);font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--faint);margin-bottom:15px;font-weight:600}
    .foot-col ul{list-style:none;display:grid;gap:10px}
    .foot-col a{color:var(--muted);font-size:.92rem}
    .foot-col a:hover{color:var(--accent-text)}
    .foot-bottom{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:38px auto 0;padding-top:22px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
    .foot-bottom p{color:var(--faint);font-size:.85rem}
    .social{display:flex;gap:9px}
    .social a{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--border);display:grid;place-items:center;color:var(--muted);transition:.22s}
    .social a svg{width:17px;height:17px;fill:currentColor}
    .social a:hover{color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(37,99,235,.16)}

    @keyframes reveal{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference){
      .reveal{animation:reveal linear both;animation-timeline:view();animation-range:entry 0% entry 24%}
    }

    @media (max-width:900px){
      .sol-card{flex:0 1 calc(50% - 9px)}
      .why-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .steps{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      .step{border-left:0;padding:0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:26px;margin-top:26px}
      .step:first-child{border-top:0;margin-top:0;padding-top:0}
    }
    @media (max-width:860px){
      .nav-links{position:fixed;inset:64px 0 auto 0;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0;background:rgba(6,13,24,.98);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 16px 18px;transform:translateY(-130%);transition:transform .32s ease;backdrop-filter:blur(18px)}
      .nav-links a{padding:14px;border-radius:10px}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-links{transform:translateY(0)}
      .nav-burger{display:flex}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-burger span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg)}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-burger span:nth-child(2){opacity:0}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-burger span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg)}
      .btn-nav{display:none}
      .impact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px 0}
      .stat{padding:8px 22px}
      .stat:nth-child(odd){border-left:0;padding-left:0}
      .foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:30px}
    }
    @media (max-width:600px){.sol-card{flex:1 1 100%}}
    @media (max-width:480px){.hero-ctas .btn{width:100%;justify-content:center}}
      /* vendors mega-dropdown */
    .nav-dd{position:relative}
    .nav-dd>.nav-dd-toggle::after{content:"\25BE";font-size:.7em;margin-left:5px;opacity:.7}
    .nav-dd-menu{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);right:0;left:auto;display:none;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(146px,1fr));gap:14px 22px;background:rgba(8,15,27,.99);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:18px;box-shadow:0 26px 64px rgba(0,0,0,.55);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);z-index:60}
    .nav-dd:hover .nav-dd-menu,.nav-dd:focus-within .nav-dd-menu{display:grid}
    .dd-cat{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
    .nav-dd-menu a{padding:4px 0!important;border-radius:0!important;background:none!important;font-size:.86rem;color:var(--muted)!important;white-space:nowrap}
    .nav-dd-menu a:hover{color:var(--accent-text)!important}
    .nav-dd-menu .dd-cat-link{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text)!important;padding-bottom:6px!important;margin-bottom:5px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    @media (max-width:860px){
      .nav-dd-menu{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;background:none;border:0;box-shadow:none;padding:4px 0 8px 14px;backdrop-filter:none}
      .nav-dd>.nav-dd-toggle::after{display:none}
    }
      /* vendor media (videos + screenshot) */
    #media .media-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px;margin-bottom:18px}
    #media .video-wrapper{position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
    #media .video-wrapper iframe{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0}
    #media .media-shot img{width:100%;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    @media (max-width:760px){#media .media-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  </style>
  <style>
    .page-hero{padding:118px 24px 56px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .page-hero .backlink{display:inline-block;color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:16px}
    .page-hero .backlink:hover{color:var(--accent-text)}
    .page-hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.3rem,5vw,3.7rem);font-weight:700;max-width:18ch;margin:.1em 0 .3em}
    .page-hero .lead{max-width:60ch}
    .vcard-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:18px}
    .vendor-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:0 1 calc(33.333% - 12px);min-width:270px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s}
    .vendor-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .vendor-card .v-img{aspect-ratio:16/10;object-fit:cover;width:100%}
    .v-body{padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
    .v-cat{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-text);font-family:var(--font)}
    .v-body h3{font-size:1.28rem;font-weight:600;margin:.4em 0 .1em}
    .v-tag{color:var(--text);font-weight:500;font-size:.94rem;margin-bottom:.5em}
    .v-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:1.1em}
    .v-foot{margin-top:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding-top:13px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .v-rating{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
    .v-rating svg{width:15px;height:15px;fill:var(--accent-text)}
    .v-link{color:var(--accent-text);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem}
    .vhero{padding:112px 24px 66px}
    .vhero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.08fr .92fr;gap:clamp(30px,5vw,60px);align-items:center}
    .vhero-text h1{font-size:clamp(2.4rem,5vw,3.7rem);font-weight:700;margin:.12em 0 .14em}
    .vtag{font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(1.1rem,1.9vw,1.35rem);font-weight:500;color:var(--accent-text);margin-bottom:.65em}
    .vhero .lead{margin-bottom:1.5em}
    .vmeta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-top:22px;color:var(--muted);font-size:.92rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .vmeta .v-rating{color:var(--text)}
    .vmeta .pill{text-transform:capitalize;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-2);border-radius:999px;padding:5px 14px;font-size:.85rem}
    .vhero-media img{width:100%;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);aspect-ratio:4/3;object-fit:cover}
    .vstatement{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,82px) 24px;border-block:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02)}
    .vstatement .wrap{max-width:980px}
    .vstatement p{font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(1.3rem,2.6vw,1.95rem);font-weight:500;line-height:1.36;letter-spacing:-.01em;color:#eaf0f8}
    .vsec{padding:clamp(50px,6vw,88px) 24px}
    .vsec.alt{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border-block:1px solid var(--border)}
    .cap-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(282px,1fr));gap:16px}
    .cap{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:22px;transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s}
    .cap:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .cap-ic{flex:0 0 auto;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:9px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:rgba(59,130,246,.12);border:1px solid var(--border-2)}
    .cap-ic svg{width:17px;height:17px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:2.2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
    .cap p{font-size:.97rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);line-height:1.45}
    .split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(28px,5vw,56px);align-items:center}
    .split-media img{width:100%;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);aspect-ratio:4/3;object-fit:cover}
    .split h2{font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3.2vw,2.3rem);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.8em}
    .benefit-list{list-style:none;display:grid;gap:0}
    .benefit-list li{display:flex;gap:13px;padding:15px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);font-size:.98rem}
    .benefit-list li:first-child{border-top:0}
    .benefit-list li svg{flex:0 0 auto;width:20px;height:20px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:2.2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;margin-top:1px}
    .lineup{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0 48px}
    .lineup .item{padding:22px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
    .lineup .item h3{font-size:1.13rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.3em}
    .lineup .item p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.93rem}
    .fit{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.25fr .75fr;gap:clamp(28px,4vw,52px);align-items:start}
    .fit h2{font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3.2vw,2.3rem);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.9em}
    .chip-list{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px}
    .chip-list li{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-2);border-radius:999px;padding:10px 18px;font-size:.92rem}
    .spec{display:grid;gap:0;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden}
    .spec .row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;padding:14px 20px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-size:.92rem}
    .spec .row:first-child{border-top:0}
    .spec .row .k{color:var(--muted)}
    .spec .row .v{color:var(--text);font-weight:600;text-transform:capitalize;text-align:right}
    .sell{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-2);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:clamp(40px,6vw,68px);text-align:center}
    .sell h2{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.4vw,2.5rem);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.4em}
    .sell .lead{margin:0 auto 2em}
    .sell-pts{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;max-width:780px;margin:0 auto 2.2em;text-align:left}
    .sell-pt{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start}
    .sell-pt svg{flex:0 0 auto;width:22px;height:22px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:1.7;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
    .sell-pt b{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;font-size:.97rem;display:block;margin-bottom:3px}
    .sell-pt span{color:var(--muted);font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.4}
    @media(max-width:900px){.vcard-grid .vendor-card{flex:0 1 calc(50% - 9px)}}
    @media(max-width:820px){.vhero-grid,.split,.fit,.lineup{grid-template-columns:1fr}.sell-pts{grid-template-columns:1fr;max-width:420px}}
    @media(max-width:600px){.vcard-grid .vendor-card{flex:1 1 100%}}
  </style>
</head>

  <main data-cms-collection="col8">

    <section id="overview" class="vhero">
      <div class="wrap vhero-grid">
        <div class="vhero-text">
          <a class="backlink" href="solutions-backup.html" data-cms="cms-27">← Backup and Recovery</a>
          <span class="eyebrow" data-cms="cms-28">Backup & Recovery</span>
          <h1 data-cms="cms-29">Macrium</h1>
          <p class="vtag" data-cms="cms-30">Reliable. Fast. Trusted.</p>
          <p class="lead" data-cms="cms-31">Trusted endpoint backup solution for homes and businesses. Fast, reliable disk imaging and backup with rapid recovery capabilities.</p>
          <div class="hero-ctas">
            <a href="index.html#contact" class="btn btn-primary" data-cms="cms-32">Call to Order</a>
          </div>
          <div class="vmeta">
            <span class="v-rating" data-cms="cms-33"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m12 2 3 6.9 7.6.6-5.8 5 1.8 7.4L12 18l-6.4 3.9 1.8-7.4-5.8-5 7.6-.6z"></path></svg>4.5 partner rating</span>
            <span class="pill" data-cms="cms-34">onprem deployment</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="vhero-media"><img src="https://rain-networks-v2.up.railway.app/ai_macrium.jpg" alt="Macrium Backup & Recovery" data-cms-img="cms-98"></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="summary" class="vstatement">
      <div class="wrap"><p data-cms="cms-35">Macrium Reflect is the gold standard for disk imaging and backup. Trusted by millions worldwide, Macrium provides fast, reliable backup and rapid recovery capabilities that keep your data safe and your business running.</p></div>
    </section>

    <section id="capabilities" class="vsec" data-cms-item="col7">
      <div class="wrap">
        <div class="sec-head"><span class="eyebrow" data-cms="cms-36">Capabilities</span><h2 data-cms="cms-37">What Macrium delivers</h2></div>
        <div class="cap-grid" data-cms-collection="col9">
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-38">Disk imaging technology</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-39">Rapid recovery capabilities</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-40">Centralized management</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-41">Incremental backups</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-42">Bare metal restore</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-43">File and folder backup</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="benefits" class="vsec alt" data-cms-item="col8">
      <div class="wrap split">
        <div class="split-media"><img src="https://rain-networks-v2.up.railway.app/container_logistics.jpg" alt="Backup & Recovery in a managed environment" data-cms-img="cms-99"></div>
        <div class="split-text">
          <h2 data-cms="cms-44">Why resellers add Macrium</h2>
          <ul class="benefit-list" data-cms-collection="col10">
              <li data-cms="cms-45" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Fast backup and recovery times</li>
              <li data-cms="cms-46" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Minimal storage requirements</li>
              <li data-cms="cms-47" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Easy to use interface</li>
              <li data-cms="cms-48" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Reliable data protection</li>
              <li data-cms="cms-49" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Flexible recovery options</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

          <div class="item" data-cms-item="col11"><h3 data-cms="cms-53">Site Manager</h3><p data-cms="cms-54">Centralized backup management</p></div>
          <div class="item" data-cms-item="col11"><h3 data-cms="cms-55">viBoot</h3><p data-cms="cms-56">Instant virtualization of backup images</p></div>
        </div>

          <div class="row" data-cms-item="col13"><span class="k" data-cms="cms-63">Deployment</span><span class="v" data-cms="cms-64">onprem</span></div>
          <div class="row" data-cms-item="col13"><span class="k" data-cms="cms-65">Best company size</span><span class="v" data-cms="cms-66">small, medium, large</span></div>

          <p class="lead center" data-cms="cms-71">Add Macrium to your portfolio and let us handle pricing, enablement, and support so you can focus on closing the deal.</p>

    img{display:block;max-width:100%}
    a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
    h1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:var(--display);line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-.02em;font-weight:600}
    section{padding:clamp(60px,8vw,116px) 24px;position:relative}
    .wrap{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto}
    .accent{color:var(--accent-text)}
    .eyebrow{display:inline-block;font-size:.74rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-text);font-family:var(--font)}
    .lead{color:var(--muted);font-size:clamp(1.02rem,1.4vw,1.16rem);max-width:60ch}
    .center{text-align:center;margin-inline:auto}
    .ico svg{width:26px;height:26px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:1.6;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}

    .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5em;font-weight:600;font-size:.98rem;padding:.82em 1.55em;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s ease,background .2s ease,border-color .2s ease}
    .btn-primary{background:var(--accent-strong);color:#fff}
    .btn-primary:hover{background:#1e54cf;transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .btn-primary:active{transform:translateY(0)}
    .btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--text);border-color:var(--border-2)}
    .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(59,130,246,.08);transform:translateY(-2px)}

    header{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;backdrop-filter:blur(14px) saturate(150%);background:rgba(6,13,24,.78);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    nav{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;padding:13px 24px;height:64px}
    .logo-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-right:auto}
    .logo-img{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--border-2)}
    .logo-text{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:-.01em}
    .nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;list-style:none}
    .nav-links a{padding:8px 13px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:500;font-size:.94rem;color:var(--muted);transition:color .2s,background .2s}
    .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--text);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05)}
    .btn-nav{background:var(--accent-strong);color:#fff;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:9px;font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;transition:background .2s,transform .2s}
    .btn-nav:hover{background:#1e54cf;transform:translateY(-1px)}
    .nav-toggle,.nav-burger{display:none}
    .nav-burger{flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;padding:8px}
    .nav-burger span{display:block;width:23px;height:2px;background:var(--text);border-radius:2px;transition:.3s}

    #hero{padding:0;min-height:88vh;display:flex;align-items:center;overflow:hidden}
    .hero-media{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0}
    .hero-bg{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
    .hero-media::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(100deg,rgba(6,13,24,.62) 0%,rgba(6,13,24,.30) 38%,transparent 66%)}
    .hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;padding:96px 24px;width:100%}
    .hero-inner h1{font-size:clamp(2.6rem,6vw,4.7rem);font-weight:700;max-width:15ch;margin:.34em 0 .42em}
    .hero-inner .lead{margin-bottom:2em;font-size:clamp(1.06rem,1.7vw,1.3rem);color:#eef3fa;max-width:46ch}
    .hero-inner h1,.hero-inner .lead,.hero-inner .eyebrow{text-shadow:0 2px 18px rgba(2,6,16,.6),0 1px 4px rgba(2,6,16,.7)}
    .hero-ctas{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:13px}

    #impact{padding-block:clamp(40px,5vw,64px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}

    .stat{padding:8px 26px;border-left:1px solid var(--border)}
    .stat:first-child{border-left:0;padding-left:0}
    .stat .n{display:block;font-family:var(--display);font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3vw,2.4rem);font-weight:600;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-.02em}
    .stat .l{display:block;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px}

    .sec-head{max-width:680px;margin-bottom:48px}
    .sec-head h2{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.6vw,2.8rem);font-weight:600;margin:.34em 0 .4em}
    .sec-head.center{margin-inline:auto}

    .sol-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:18px}
    .sol-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:0 1 calc(33.333% - 12px);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .3s ease,border-color .3s ease}
    .sol-link{margin-top:auto;color:var(--accent-text);font-weight:600;font-size:.92rem}
    .sol-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:var(--accent)}
    .sol-card .thumb{aspect-ratio:16/10;overflow:hidden}
    .sol-card .thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .5s ease}
    .sol-card:hover .thumb img{transform:scale(1.05)}
    .sol-body{padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}

    .feat-list{list-style:none;display:grid;gap:9px;margin-top:auto}

    .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0 56px}
    .why-item{display:flex;gap:18px;padding:26px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}

    .why-item h3{font-size:1.12rem;margin-bottom:.35em;font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600}

    .step p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.96rem}

    .vcard-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:18px}

    .vendor-card .v-img{aspect-ratio:16/10;object-fit:cover;width:100%}

    .v-body h3{font-size:1.28rem;font-weight:600;margin:.4em 0 .1em}
    .v-tag{color:var(--text);font-weight:500;font-size:.94rem;margin-bottom:.5em}
    .v-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:1.1em}
    .v-foot{margin-top:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding-top:13px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}

    .pull{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center}

    .social{display:flex;gap:9px}

    .social a svg{width:17px;height:17px;fill:currentColor}

    @keyframes reveal{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference){
      .reveal{animation:reveal linear both;animation-timeline:view();animation-range:entry 0% entry 24%}
    }

    }

      .nav-links a{padding:14px;border-radius:10px}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-links{transform:translateY(0)}
      .nav-burger{display:flex}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-burger span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg)}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-burger span:nth-child(2){opacity:0}
      .nav-toggle:checked ~ .nav-burger span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg)}
      .btn-nav{display:none}
      .impact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px 0}
      .stat{padding:8px 22px}
      .stat:nth-child(odd){border-left:0;padding-left:0}
      .foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:30px}
    }

    @media (max-width:480px){.hero-ctas .btn{width:100%;justify-content:center}}

    .spec .row:first-child{border-top:0}
    .spec .row .k{color:var(--muted)}
    .spec .row .v{color:var(--text);font-weight:600;text-transform:capitalize;text-align:right}
    .sell{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-2);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:clamp(40px,6vw,68px);text-align:center}
    .sell h2{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.4vw,2.5rem);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.4em}
    .sell .lead{margin:0 auto 2em}
    .sell-pts{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;max-width:780px;margin:0 auto 2.2em;text-align:left}
    .sell-pt{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start}
    .sell-pt svg{flex:0 0 auto;width:22px;height:22px;stroke:var(--accent-text);fill:none;stroke-width:1.7;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
    .sell-pt b{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;font-size:.97rem;display:block;margin-bottom:3px}
    .sell-pt span{color:var(--muted);font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.4}
    @media(max-width:900px){.vcard-grid .vendor-card{flex:0 1 calc(50% - 9px)}}
    @media(max-width:820px){.vhero-grid,.split,.fit,.lineup{grid-template-columns:1fr}.sell-pts{grid-template-columns:1fr;max-width:420px}}
    @media(max-width:600px){.vcard-grid .vendor-card{flex:1 1 100%}}
  </style>
</head>

    <section id="overview" class="vhero">
      <div class="wrap vhero-grid">

          <a class="backlink" href="solutions-backup.html" data-cms="cms-27">← Backup and Recovery</a>
          <span class="eyebrow" data-cms="cms-28">Backup & Recovery</span>
          <h1 data-cms="cms-29">Redstor</h1>
          <p class="vtag" data-cms="cms-30">Cloud-First. Instant Recovery. Protected.</p>
          <p class="lead" data-cms="cms-31">Cloud-first backup and recovery solution with instant data access and ransomware protection.</p>
          <div class="hero-ctas">
            <a href="index.html#contact" class="btn btn-primary" data-cms="cms-32">Call to Order</a>
          </div>
          <div class="vmeta">
            <span class="v-rating" data-cms="cms-33"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m12 2 3 6.9 7.6.6-5.8 5 1.8 7.4L12 18l-6.4 3.9 1.8-7.4-5.8-5 7.6-.6z"></path></svg>4.2 partner rating</span>
            <span class="pill" data-cms="cms-34">cloud deployment</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="vhero-media"><img src="https://rain-networks-v2.up.railway.app/ai_redstor.jpg" alt="Redstor Backup & Recovery" data-cms-img="cms-98"></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="summary" class="vstatement">
      <div class="wrap"><p data-cms="cms-35">Redstor provides cloud-first backup and recovery with instant data access and ransomware protection. Protect your data across endpoints, servers, and SaaS applications with a single, unified solution.</p></div>
    </section>

    <section id="capabilities" class="vsec" data-cms-item="col7">
      <div class="wrap">
        <div class="sec-head"><span class="eyebrow" data-cms="cms-36">Capabilities</span><h2 data-cms="cms-37">What Redstor delivers</h2></div>
        <div class="cap-grid" data-cms-collection="col9">
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-38">Cloud backup</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-39">Instant recovery</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-40">Ransomware protection</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-41">Data migration</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-42">SaaS backup</p></div>
          <div class="cap" data-cms-item="col9"><span class="cap-ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg></span><p data-cms="cms-43">Global deduplication</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="benefits" class="vsec alt" data-cms-item="col8">
      <div class="wrap split">
        <div class="split-media"><img src="https://rain-networks-v2.up.railway.app/container_logistics.jpg" alt="Backup & Recovery in a managed environment" data-cms-img="cms-99"></div>
        <div class="split-text">
          <h2 data-cms="cms-44">Why resellers add Redstor</h2>
          <ul class="benefit-list" data-cms-collection="col10">
              <li data-cms="cms-45" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Fast recovery times</li>
              <li data-cms="cms-46" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Ransomware-proof backups</li>
              <li data-cms="cms-47" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Reduced storage costs</li>
              <li data-cms="cms-48" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Easy cloud migration</li>
              <li data-cms="cms-49" data-cms-item="col10"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="m5 12 4 4 10-10"></path></svg>Comprehensive protection</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

        <div class="lineup" data-cms-collection="col11">

          <div class="item" data-cms-item="col11"><h3 data-cms="cms-53">SaaS Backup</h3><p data-cms="cms-54">Protect Microsoft 365 and more</p></div>
          <div class="item" data-cms-item="col11"><h3 data-cms="cms-55">Data Migration</h3><p data-cms="cms-56">Seamless cloud migration</p></div>
